name: Nukkleus Inc.
summary: Nukkleus Inc., a financial technology company, focuses on providing software and technology solutions for retail foreign exchange trading industry worldwide. It primarily offers customer sales and marketing, and risk management technology hardware and software solutions. The company was formerly known as Compliance & Risk Management Solutions Inc. and changed its name to Nukkleus Inc. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jersey City, New Jersey. Nukkleus Inc. is a subsidiary of Currency Mountain Holdings Bermuda, Limited.
